hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if not f: sys.exit(0)
if re.search(r'/src/|/scripts/|/conf/', f) and not re.search(r'CLAUDE\\.md|\\.claude/commands/', f):
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': f'Pipeline file edited: {f} — check if CLAUDE.md or .claude/commands/ skill files need updating.'}}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
